XOnlineFriendsEnumerate

Creates an asynchronous task to enumerate the friends on the specified player's friends list.

HRESULT XOnlineFriendsEnumerate(
    DWORD dwUserIndex,
    HANDLE hWorkEvent,
    PXONLINETASK_HANDLE phTask
);

Parameters

dwUserIndex
[in] Controller index (zero-based) of the player whose friends list is to be enumerated. The player must have been successfully logged on with a previous call to XOnlineLogon.
hWorkEvent
[in, optional] Handle to an event that will be signaled when there is work to be done on the enumeration task. This parameter can be NULL if no such event is required.
phTask
[out] Pointer to a variable of type XONLINETASK_HANDLE that receives a task handle representing this enumeration request. The handle can then be used in calls to XOnlineTaskContinue to perform work associated with this task.

Return Values

If XOnlineFriendsEnumerate succeeds, the return value is S_OK.

If XOnlineFriendsEnumerate fails, the return value is one of the following error codes.

Value Description
XONLINE_E_NOTIFICATION_NO_TASK The friends startup task is not active. You must first call XOnlineFriendsStartup to create the startup task.
E_OUTOFMEMORY Insufficient memory. Free some memory.
E_FAIL Unspecified failure. If you receive this error, try the following:
  • Check your arguments to this function.
  • Contact Support.
  • If this happens in a game, try again later.
Other See Online Errors for information about other possible errors.

Remarks

The XOnlineFriendsStartup function must be called before calling XOnlineFriendsEnumerate.

The asynchronous task handle returned by this function should be pumped until XOnlineTaskContinue returns XONLINETASK_S_RESULTS_AVAIL, indicating that the current friends list is available. At that point, call XOnlineFriendsGetLatest, XOnlineFriendsGetLatestByFocus, or XOnlineFriendsGetLatestByRange to retrieve the list.

After initially retrieving the friends list, continue to pump the handle while the friends list is being displayed to the player. Pumping the handle processes updates to the list. When an updated list is available, XOnlineTaskContinue returns XONLINETASK_S_RESULTS_AVAIL. When the title receives this return value, it should call one of the "GetLatest" functions mentioned previously to retrieve the updated list.

When the title no longer needs to display the friends list, it should call XOnlineFriendsEnumerateFinish, passing in the task handle returned by XOnlineFriendsEnumerate. XOnlineFriendsEnumerateFinish waits to receive any further updates from the service, then caches the friends list to the Xbox hard disk. After XOnlineFriendsEnumerateFinish returns, continue to pump the task handle until XOnlineTaskContinue returns XONLINETASK_S_SUCCESS, then call XOnlineTaskClose to close the task handle.

There is typically no reason to pump the task handle throughout the life of the game. The task needs to be active only while the friends list is being displayed.

If XOnlineTaskContinue at any time returns an error code for this task, an error has occurred in enumeration processing; the task should be closed and XOnlineFriendsEnumerate called again to restart the enumeration.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

Import Library: Use Xonline.lib.

See Also

Xbox Live Functions | Friends Lists | XOnlineFriendsEnumerateFinish, XOnlineFriendsGetLatest, XOnlineFriendsGetLatestByFocus, XOnlineFriendsGetLatestByRange, XOnlineFriendsStartup
